description: A photograph of about eight small hand-crank music boxes lined up in two rows on a dark surface against a wooden background. Each wooden box is decorated with the branding of a different film or franchise, with visible labels including ZELDA, GAME OF THRONES, FROZEN and a Harry Potter design. The image carries no overlaid text beyond the printed box labels.
notable_text: ZELDA; GAME OF THRONES; FROZEN; Harry Potter
